pullRequest.title: Document internal-agent draft PR smoke tests
pullRequest.author: fashn-internal-agent-dev[bot]

overview.headline: Documents that draft pull requests may be opened by the FASHN Internal Agent to validate repository-change automation.
overview.body:
## Purpose
This PR adds a short note to the README informing contributors that draft pull requests may be opened by the FASHN Internal Agent to validate repository-change automation. The goal is to prevent confusion when such draft PRs appear.

## Scope
The change is limited to a single file: `README.md`. It adds a new section titled "Internal Agent Smoke Test" with one sentence. No code, configuration, or workflow files are modified.

## Impact
This is a documentation-only change. It has no effect on runtime behavior or the CI/CD pipeline.

review.summary: Code Beat did not find clear actionable issues in this pull request.
